name: Constitution
desc: A high constitution stat decreases the effectiveness of potions and poisions

name: Perception
desc: A high perception stat allows you to get more information from researching, harvesting and allows you to find more plants

name: Luck
desc: A high Luck stat allows you to find rarer items more often

name: Dexterity
desc: A high dexterity stat increases the quality of crafted items
